title: add metamodel and model
head: add-metamodel-and-model
body: Adds the university metamodel and the university-1 model.

title: update metamodel and model
head: update-metamodel-and-model
body: Adds the year of publication attribute to the book class in the Library metamodel and updates the library-1 model accordingly.

title: delete metamodel and model
head: delete-metamodel-and-model
body: Deletes the library metamodel and the library-1 model.

title: conflicting model
head: conflicting-model
body: Removes the age attribute from a patient in valdecilla.model. This attribute will be updated in a different commit on the target branch, leading to a conflict.

title: incorrect config
head: incorrect-config
body: Adds the year of publication attribute to the book class in the Library metamodel. However, the configuration file is missing the library.ecore metamodel.

title: no model/metamodel files changed
head: no-model-or-metamodel-files
body: No relevant files (models or metamodels) are added, deleted or updated.

title: no relevant model/metamodel changes
head: no-relevant-changes
body: Changes the libary metamodel and the library-1 model, but they are not relevant to the analysis.

title: update metamodel but not conforming models
head: update-metamodel-not-model
body: Updates the libary metamodel but leaves the library-1 model unchanged.
